caption: A man with short, light-colored hair and glasses, wearing a light-colored suit jacket, is captured in a side profile as he speaks. He is seated in what appears to be a formal meeting setting, with a wooden desk and a blue folder visible in front of him. Behind him, a person in a dark suit stands near a red tote bag featuring a cartoon character. On-screen text at the bottom identifies the event as "April 12, 2019," "ORCA," and "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs," with a green banner stating "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage." Across the sequence, the man gestures with his right hand; he starts by extending his hand outward, lifts it higher in a waving motion, and then brings it back down toward the table. His facial expression remains focused as he continues to speak throughout the clip.
